 An amazing piece of craftmanship. Unique in every way with painstaking detail. Extreme attention to every part of the yoroi. 
 An amazing piece of craftmanship. Unique in every way with painstaking detail. Extreme attention to every part of the yoroi. 
 Warlord DATE MASAMUNE's suit of armor 
 This Yoroi is designed inspired after Tokugawa Ieyasu's most famous heritage suit of armor featuring the Daikoku-Zukin helmet with the beaten gold fern fronds headerboard. It is known he won the Sekigahara with this suit. This suit's body armor is constructed by hand, using multiple iron pieces, genuine leather, beautiful silk lacings and elaborately crafted chainmail. This Yoroi comes with all parts and accessories listed in the charts below, and can be worn, if desired.A number of traditional Japanese family crests can be added to your armor's chest and/or the storage box for free. You can choose your favorite samurai crest from our list.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Japanese Muromachi Era Samurai Armor Set
[METADATA/INTRO]: Authentic Muromachi Era Samurai Armor | 1333–1573 | Japanese Warrior Armor Set with Gold Crest & Edo Period Lacing Description...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: - Muromachi Samurai Armor (1333–1573) with Edo-period elements 
 - 24-plate suji-bachi kabuto with black lacquer and extended fukigaeshi 
 - Full menpo facial armor with a fierce expression 
 - Gold-painted mon (family crest) on the lacquered cuirass 
 - Edo-period multi-colored silk lacing (odoshi) 
 - Chainmail (kusari) reinforced textile sleeves 
 - Wooden armor stand for display 
 This samurai armor is not only a functional battle gear but also a symbol of prestige, honor, and identity. The suji-bachi kabuto and gold mon represent the elite craftsmanship of the Muromachi era. It reflects the bushidō code—honor, loyalty, and martial prowess. A prized collectible for samurai history enthusiasts and art collectors, this set provides a rare look into Japan’s warrior aristocracy.

[TITLE]: Traditional Samurai Armor | Handmade Tokugawa Clan Black Japanese Samurai Armor With Helmet, Life Size Samurai Armor Yor - TrueKatana
[METADATA/INTRO]: Handmade Tokugawa Clan Black Japanese Samurai Armor With Helmet, Life Size Samurai Armor Yor - Full sized and fully functional armor, display size: 69*30*30 inches. standard size armor fits between 5.5 and 6.0 feet tall with average body type....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Product Introduction: The Tokugawa Clan Black samurai armor suits are all handmade, these life sized, fully functional, and completely authentic preproduction Japanese Samurai Armor and helmets are made with authentic methods and materials only. Every suit has been researched and made after private collections, museums, or temples of the actual armor. Each piece of armor is made specifically for re-enactors and private collectors that demand authenticity, detail, and quality of materials. Each Japanese samurai suit comes with everything you see in the photo, which includes the black lacquered display storage box and display stand holding the armor. Each armor comes pre-fitted for a person who stands between 170 and 180 cm tall with an average body type. The armor can be easily adjusted for a better fit by the owner. We also offer customized Armor, if needed, please provide the height, arm length, bust, waist, and the length from belly button to the chest.
